title: Happy Birthday, Elie
dedication: For Elie, with all the love in the world. May every page remind you how special you are.

pages.text: It's your birthday, Elie! Everything is ready for the most amazing party in the world. The balloons, the gifts, and the fun are waiting for you!
pages.text_below: Everything is ready for the most amazing party in the world. The balloons, the gifts, and the fun are waiting for you!
pages.scene_prompt: Children's storybook watercolor illustration, soft luminous colors, magical warm lighting. CHARACTER: A single little boy (4 year old), bright red short cropped straight boy haircut, trimmed above ears and neatly tapered, hazel green-brown eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, happy excited expression, arms raised in joy. OUTFIT: Colorful festive party outfit. ACTION: Standing in a colorful birthday party room with arms raised in excitement, surrounded by floating balloons. SETTING: Birthday party room WIDE VIEW, colorful floating balloons, beautifully wrapped gift boxes on floor, streamers and party banners. ATMOSPHERE: Festive joyful celebration, warm golden lighting, magical sparkles. STRICT: Only ONE child, little boy is 100% human with normal body, no duplicates. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: The first thing you do when you wake up is smile. Because you know today is your special day and there are many surprises waiting for you.
pages.text_above: The first thing you do when you wake up is smile.
pages.text_below: Because you know today is your special day and there are many surprises waiting for you.

pages.text: Time to open the presents! Every box holds something special, chosen with lots of love. Your eyes sparkle with excitement!
pages.text_below: Every box holds something special, chosen with lots of love. Your eyes sparkle with excitement!

pages.text: The party is full of fun games. Races, laughter, and lots of mischief. You can't stop having fun!
pages.text_above: The party is full of fun games.
pages.text_below: Races, laughter, and lots of mischief. You can't stop having fun!

pages.text: You put on your birthday crown and feel like royalty. Today you are the star and everyone wants to celebrate with you.

pages.text: Colorful balloons fill the whole party. You catch a red one, release a blue one, and laugh as they fly everywhere!

pages.text: Here comes the birthday cake, Elie! It has 4 shining candles just for you. Close your eyes, make a wish... and blow!
pages.text_above: Here comes the birthday cake, Elie!
pages.text_below: It has 4 shining candles just for you. Close your eyes, make a wish... and blow!
pages.scene_prompt: Children's storybook watercolor illustration, soft luminous colors, magical warm lighting. CHARACTER: A single little boy (4 year old), bright red short cropped straight boy haircut, trimmed above ears and neatly tapered, hazel green-brown eyes, light peach with warm rosy undertones skin, excited expression, puffed cheeks ready to blow. OUTFIT: Festive party outfit. ACTION: Standing in front of a decorated party table, leaning forward with puffed cheeks ready to blow out 4 candles on a beautiful simple round birthday cake. The cake has ONLY 4 colorful candles arranged in a neat row on top, each candle clearly separated. A large shiny 3D red number 4 floats to the right of the child at head height, glossy balloon-like texture. SETTING: Birthday party table WIDE VIEW, one simple cake, colorful cupcakes and treats, balloons and streamers in background. ATMOSPHERE: Warm celebratory moment, golden candlelight glow, magical wish anticipation. STRICT: Only ONE child, only ONE cake, cake has EXACTLY 4 candles and NO MORE, little boy is 100% human with normal body, no duplicates, the red 3D number 4 must be clearly visible. NO text, NO watermark, NO signature, NO logo, NO artist name, NO handwriting, NO calligraphy, clean illustration only

pages.text: It has been the best birthday in the world. But the most beautiful thing of all is that you have us, and we love you with all our hearts.

closing_message: Happy birthday, Elie. May this new year be full of games, adventures, hugs, and happy moments. We love you today and always.
